title: Playground
description: A personal flywheel for habits, dreams, and projects. Build, act, learn, repeat.

items.name: Screen time
items.focus: Mobile tracking via iOS app is working. Real issue is desktop — work bleeding into evenings and weekends.
items.next: Set a clear boundary for desktop work in evenings.

log.note: Started tracking. iOS app handles mobile. Desktop is the actual problem — need an evening/weekend boundary.

items.name: Meditation
items.focus: Slacked off for a week. Rebooting. Morning slot uncertain — works better during agent runs at work.
items.next: Restart tomorrow. Try meditating while an agent runs.

log.note: Missed a week. Morning timing not ideal. Works well during agent runs at work — could be the move.

items.name: DM a friend
items.focus: Happens sometimes but not consistently. Needs more discipline.
items.next: Send one DM today. Build the streak back.

log.note: Inconsistent. Happens but not daily. Need to recommit.

items.name: Fast after dinner
items.focus: Going well. Occasional breaks which seems healthy and fine.
items.next: Keep going. Don't overthink the occasional exception.

log.note: Mostly consistent. Breaking occasionally seems fine — not a problem.

items.name: Wake to alarm
items.focus: Lagged for a week or two. Restarting now.
items.next: Set alarm for tomorrow. Get up when it goes off.

log.note: Fell off for 1-2 weeks. Recommitting today.

items.name: Dancing
items.focus: Active in 5Rhythms and learning swing. Want to explore latin styles.
items.next: Find a latin dance class or social.

log.note: Steady. 5Rhythms and swing ongoing. Latin next.

items.name: Music
items.focus: West African rhythm class is the anchor. Interested in expanding to voice and other instruments.
items.next: Try one thing with voice — a class, a jam, anything.

log.note: Steady. Rhythm class ongoing. Voice and instruments aspirational.

items.name: Coloft
items.focus: Active in local gatherings. Want to explore the region more and build better community tools.
items.next: Plan one regional trip or adventure.

log.note: Local engagement solid. Regional exploration and event capture tools are potential next projects.
Event & flyer capture tool — photograph flyers, make them searchable/shareable. Could be first real project spin-off.

items.name: Nature
items.focus: Aspiring to live closer to the land. Plant ID, gardening, and fishing are the entry points.
items.next: Pick one: find a plant ID walk, a community garden, or go fishing.

log.note: Strong interest but no action yet. Permaculture and hunting further out.
Fishing: Buy CA license, grab light tackle, try Del Norte Street Pier (Eureka) for redtail perch — in season now.
Gardening: First Saturday native gardening in Old Town Eureka (11:30am, 2nd & F St). Join Humboldt Permaculture Guild mailing list at humboldtpermaculture.org.
